name: Private Fairway South Jordan
about: Private Fairway South Jordan is an indoor golf studio that provides members with 24-hour access to a single, private simulator bay equipped with TrackMan 4 technology. The venue is designed for dedicated practice and virtual play, offering complete privacy without complicated booking rules or judgment. Members can choose from various membership options, including monthly unlimited or session passes, and are required to complete an orientation to receive a key fob for access. The facility utilizes premium TrackMan technology to capture detailed swing data and provide a realistic golfing experience on hyper-accurate virtual courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Complete privacy in a dedicated simulator bay
Premium TrackMan 4 technology with detailed swing data
Ability to track progress and play world-renowned virtual courses

food_and_drink.notes: No food available on-site, but DoorDash can be ordered

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch capturing 26 club and ball data points

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs to use the TrackMan simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or alcohol is available on-site, but members can order food through DoorDash. The studio includes a TV and music for a complete experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 virtual holes is not specified, but sessions are booked in 50-minute increments and can be booked back-to-back for longer visits.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is not marketed as kid-friendly and is designed for serious golf practice and play.
